texto: Some moments in a life, and they needn't be very long or seem very important, can make up for so much in that life; can redeem, justify, that pain, that bewilderment, with which one lives, and invest one with the courage not only to endure it, but to profit from it' some moments teach one the price of human connection: if one can live with one's own pain, then one respects the pain of others, and so, briefly, but transcendentally, we can release each other from pain.
explicacao: Citação de James Long sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Some moments in a life, and they needn't be very long or seem very important, can make up for so …” articula educacao, connection, pain em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como termino e pain.
